name: @xpaysh/template-adapter
description: Reference PlatformAdapter implementation for an imaginary 'demo' eCommerce platform. Copy this directory to bootstrap a new agentic-commerce-for-<platform> plugin — every method is wired to a deterministic in-memory catalog so the sample boots and serves the protocol routes without any external credentials.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
